notifications.discordError: Discord error: {{error}}. Check if Discord is running.

language.description: Choose the language of the app
language.title: Language

launchStartup.description: Aeon Manager will launch on startup
launchStartup.title: Launch on startup

minimizeTray.description: Hide Aeon Manager to the tray when pressing minimize
minimizeTray.title: Minimize to tray

rewardNotifications.description: Enable this if you want to see Aeon Manager notifications
rewardNotifications.title: Reward Notifications

autoImport.description: Import your cookies to enable HoYoLAB automation via Aeon Manager
autoImport.title: Cookies Import

confirmImport.description: Automatically import cookies from your browser. Note: you must be logged into HoYoLAB before importing
confirmImport.title: Import Cookies

confirmRemove.description: Remove imported HoYoLAB cookies from Aeon Manager
confirmRemove.title: Remove Cookies

manualImport.description: Manually import your HoYoLAB cookies using DevTools in your browser
manualImport.title: Manual Import

manualModal.description: Paste your HoYoLAB cookies from DevTools below.
manualModal.title: Manual Cookie Import

remove.description: Remove imported HoYoLAB cookies from Aeon Manager
remove.title: Remove Cookies

checkIn.description: Enable if you want to enable automated check in claim every day
checkIn.title: check in rewards

redemptionCodes.description: Enable automatic redemption for codes found in the Aeon Manager code database
redemptionCodes.title: Redemption Codes

intro.title: Let Aeons handle the daily routine
intro.description: Aeon Manager keeps your HoYoLAB check ins, redemption codes, and reward reminders in one quiet place

checkins.title: Daily check ins
checkins.description: Get notification about check ins or automate them

codes.title: Code tracking
codes.description: See new redemption codes for your favourite games

control.title: Your control
control.description: Choose if you want to import cookies for automation or receive links without importing anything

cookies.question: Do you want to import cookies?
cookies.description: Choose how Aeon Manager helps you with the routine tasks. You can change this later in Settings

import.title: Yes, enable automation
import.description: Import my HoYoLAB cookies so Aeon Manager can claim daily check ins and redeem codes automatically

links.title: No, links only
links.description: Skip cookie import. Aeon Manager will show new redemption codes and check ins links, that I will open myself

cookieImport.title: How would you like to import cookies?
cookieImport.description: Automatic import is quickest if you are already logged into HoYoLAB in a supported browser. You can import them manually using DevTools in your browser

automatic.title: Automatic import
automatic.description: Aeon Manager will find your HoYoLAB cookies and save the required values

manual.title: Manual import
manual.description: Paste cookie_token_v2 and account_id_v2 yourself following the instructions

games.title: Choose the games that you want to manage
games.description: Enable the games that you play and want to receive updates about

regions.title: Choose regions for each game
regions.description: Pick the regions where each enabled game has an account. Automatic code redemption will only run for those regions
regions.noGames: No games are enabled yet. You can go back and choose games

preferences.title: Configure the rest of the options
preferences.description: Choose what should happen automatically and how app launches
preferences.cookiesNeeded: Available after HoYoLAB cookies are imported

manualCookies.devtoolsTooltip: Ctrl+Shift+I on Windows/Linux, Cmd+Option+I on Mac, or Right Click -> Inspect
manualCookies.step1AfterLink: and log in to your account.
manualCookies.step4: Find cookie_token_v2 and account_id_v2, copy their values and paste them in the fields.
manualCookies.storageCookiesTooltip: In Chrome/Edge: Application tab -> Storage -> Cookies. In Firefox: Storage tab -> Cookies.
manualCookies.title: How to get cookies

home.emptyDescription: Enable at least one game to show your dashboard and redemption codes here

codes.chooseRegion: Choose at least one account region for this game

account.backupCodeAdvice: Save your backup codes somewhere. You'll need one to restore your account on another device

deleteSecondary.description: This will permanently delete your secondary backup code and it will not work anymore
deleteSecondary.title: Delete Secondary Code?

generateSecondary.description: Creates a second backup code for your account that you can use to restore your account
generateSecondary.title: Generate Secondary Code

regenerate.description: This will generate a new UUID, the old one will not work anymore
regenerate.title: Regenerate Backup Code?

updates.none: Aeon Manager is up to date.

logs.failedRecordCodeAttempt: Failed to record code redemption attempt: {{error}}
logs.failedShowCodeRedemptionNotification: Failed to show code redemption notification: {{error}}
logs.failedShowCheckinNotification: Failed to show check in notification: {{error}}

checkin.titleSuccess: Aeon Manager claimed check in rewards
checkin.manualReminderBody: The daily check in day has reset. You can check in again

account.emptyServerResponse: The account server returned an empty response
account.unreadableServerResponse: The account server returned a response Aeon Manager could not read
account.usernameInvalid: Username cannot contain colons or control characters

codes.codeUnavailable: Code is unavailable or cannot be redeemed for this account
codes.failedFetchLinkedAccounts: Failed to fetch linked game accounts
codes.missingRole: No linked game account found for this region
codes.missingRoleForRegion: No linked game account found for {{region}}
codes.unsupported: Code redemption is not supported for this game yet

cookies.importMissing: No HoYoLAB cookies found. Make sure you're logged in to HoYoLAB in a supported browser
cookies.manualRequired: Both cookie_token_v2 and account_id_v2 are required
cookies.saveFailed: Cookies could not be saved. Check app permissions and try again
cookies.saveFailedAfterImport: Cookies were found but could not be saved, try manual import

settings.regionsType: regions must be a game-to-regions object
settings.settingStringOrNull: {{option}} must be a string or null

errors.cookiesRequired: Cookies are required for automatic check in
